prestazioni: Engine: M112 E32 ML supercharged 3.2L V6 (AMG-derived, code M112 E32) with a custom Harrop HTV-2300 supercharger upgrade (12 psi boost, replacing the stock 8 psi Eaton M112), paired with a forged internals kit from Mahle (pistons, connecting rods) and ARP head studs for 11.5:1 compression. Requires a custom fuel system with dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps and ID1000 injectors.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD (part # QDF7J) for the 6-speed manual transmission (Getrag 235), paired with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (part # 3000 951 001) and a lightweight aluminum flywheel from Fidanza (part # 228021).

Suspension: KW Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, part # 35221001) with custom valving for the Crossfire's multi-link rear and double-wishbone front, paired with H&R 25mm front and 22mm rear sway bars (part # 54655-25 and 54656-22). Bushings upgraded to Energy Suspension polyurethane (part # 9.5104G for front control arms, 9.5105G for rear).
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny Crossfire-specific widebody kit (part # RB-CF01) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders, paired with a custom vented hood from Seibon Carbon (part # CF-0401-HOOD).
Wheels: BBS LM-RS II 19x9.5 ET25 front and 19x11 ET15 rear (part # 40312300095 and 40312300115) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear).

Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats (part # 388 011 400) with custom Alcantara upholstery by Status Racing, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (part # 0111200113) and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (T45 steel, bolt-in design with harness bar).
